calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-23-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Janet Pond. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, R. Parmar and Defendant, Valerir Mitchell, appeared in pro per. Plaintiff's attorney stated to the Court that the case settled out of court. Trial date is vacated.
